channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Walmart agrees to $100M settlement over deceptive pay practices in Spark Driver program
item.description: The suit said Walmart mislead drivers about their possible tips and would reduce their base pay, among other things.

item.title: Salesforce’s record $50 billion stock-buyback plan is proving controversial on Wall Street
item.description: Salesforce is looking to buy the dip with a $50 billion share-repurchase program as the software selloff continues to send its stock falling, but Wall...

item.title: 5 perks that make the Atmos Ascent Card worth more than its $95 annual fee
item.description: For Alaska and Hawaiian airline loyalists, the Atmos Ascent can be a valuable option at a low annual fee. Here's why this card is worth adding to your...

item.title: John Stamos & Jodie Sweetin Dance to Taylor Swift in Sweet 'Full House' Reunion
item.description: John Stamos and Jodie Sweetin's "Full House" reunion was full of dancing ... with the two stars cutting a rug in a sweet vid. The stars of the hit com...

item.title: Cardi B Is Still Welcome at 'SNL' After Alleged Nicki Minaj Outburst on Set
item.description: Cardi B’s alleged backstage meltdown over a Nicki Minaj gag may have shaken the walls at 'SNL' ... but we're told there's no hard feelings! Sources cl...

item.title: Katherine Short Changed Her Name to Katherine Hartley to Avoid Harassment
item.description: Katherine Short thought she'd feel safer as a social worker by putting distance between herself and her famous father ... filing a petition to change ...

item.title: It's Time To Wash Your Makeup Brushes — Our Easy DIY Guide & Recipe
item.description: Be honest: When is the last time you washed your makeup brushes?

item.title: Mike White Shocks Fellow Castaways With Ripped Abs on 'Survivor 50' Premiere
item.description: Lookin' good, Mike White! "Survivor 50" boasts the largest cast of any season ... but Mike stood out right away, as competitors noticed his "bulging 6...

item.title: Forget Biohacking — Here's What Longevity Really Looks Like for Women
item.description: Modern medicine has long treated women's health as a series of isolated chapters. Longevity care reframes the entire story.

item.title: Delta is trialing Bluetooth headphone pairing on more of its planes
item.description: Delta Air Lines has a lot of seatback screens, but only a few pair with Bluetooth headphones. That may soon change.

item.title: This Spice Can Alleviate PMS: Here's How To Take It For Max Results
item.description: We spoke with a "spice expert" on how supplementation can curb symptoms of PMS.

item.title: Cisco says hackers have been exploiting a critical bug to break into big customer networks since 2023
item.description: The U.S. government and its allies said hackers have been exploiting the newly identified bug in Cisco networking gear around the world for years, and...

item.title: Google launches Nano Banana 2 model with faster image generation
item.description: Google is making Nano Banana 2 a default model in Gemini app and in AI mode

item.title: Self-driving truck startup Einride raises $113M PIPE ahead of public debut
item.description: Self-driving trucks startup Einride has raised an oversubscribed $113 million PIPE in advance of its SPAC merger scheduled for early 2026.

item.title: These S&P 500 alternatives have shined so far this year
item.description: So far in 2026, a number of index funds that follow alternative strategies to track subsets of the S&P 500 or change the index’s weighting have perfor...

item.title: 'Below Deck's Captain Sandy Yawn Confronts Accused Scam Builder in Court, On Video
item.description: Captain Sandy Yawn steered herself straight into a courtroom showdown ... accusing a contractor of pocketing millions of dollars from people like her ...

item.title: Las Vegas lands first-ever nonstop flight to Australia
item.description: Qantas will debut the first-ever nonstop to Las Vegas from Australia in December.

item.title: As deal drama swirls around Warner Bros., its earnings show a declining industry
item.description: With Warner Bros. Discovery deep in negotiations to be acquired, its earnings show it is a company struggling in a fast-changing industry.

item.title: Earn up to 175,000 Hilton points and a free night with one of Hilton's American Express cards
item.description: A look at the current welcome offers on the Hilton Honors Amex cards, which allow new cardmembers to earn bonus points along with an array of other pe...

item.title: The S&P 500 is caught in an extremely narrow trading range. What’s happening beneath the surface could decide where the index goes next.
item.description: Software stocks have sunk. Defensive names, including consumer-staples stocks like Walmart and Costco, have rallied. Yet, despite all of the chaotic m...

item.title: An Esthetician Shares How To Fix "Oily Dehydrated" Skin
item.description: Skin care concerns—and sometimes types—are never mutually exclusive.

item.title: A VC and some big-name programmers are trying to solve open source’s funding problem, permanently
item.description: A group of well-known open source programmers and a VC have launched the Open Source Endowment. They hope this new method will provide funding for goo...

item.title: Why Nvidia’s stock is falling despite a historic earnings beat
item.description: Blockbuster earnings were perhaps anticipated as Nvidia’s big customers have already indicated how much they’ve hiked their spending on hardware.

item.title: The Results Are In & This Is The Dirtiest Spot On Most People's Desks
item.description: For those working from home, it's important to regularly clean your desk space.

item.title: Coming soon: Use your Amex Resy credit at wineries and even more restaurants
item.description: Amex cardholders will soon see more restaurants and wineries on Resy as Tock joins the platform. Here’s what it means for your dining credits.
